nasb.text: ‘Then on the sixth day: eight bulls, two rams, fourteen male lambs one year old without defect;

esv.text: “On the sixth day eight bulls, two rams, fourteen male lambs a year old without blemish,

cnv.text: “‘第六日，要獻公牛八頭、公綿羊兩隻、一歲沒有殘疾的公羊羔十四隻；

ccb.text: “节期的第六天，你们要献上毫无残疾的公牛八头、公绵羊两只和一岁的公羊羔十四只；
